title: Landlord Rights Information/Counseling - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Landlord Rights Information/Counseling 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Mobile Home Residents Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF CORVALLIS LIVABILITY CODE ENFORCEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts and handles complaints about housing conditions under the Corvallis Livability Code and coordinates investigation and code enforcement, as necessary. 501 SW Madison Avenue Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-11am and noon-5pm Email (541) 766-6944 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF PORTLAND CITY OF PORTLAND HOUSING BUREAU RENTAL SERVICES HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers general information and technical assistance with Portland City Codes, which provide residential rental consumer protections, information about state and federal landlord/tenant laws, and/or recommend resources for additional information. The Rental Services Office cannot provide legal or business advice or intervene in a landlord/tenant dispute. They do not supply direct rent payments, relocation, or other financial assistance. 1900 SW Fourth Avenue Suite 7007 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-11am and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 823-1303 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information, referrals, and support for landlord-tenant issues, fair housing, and complaints of housing discrimination. Maintains listings of low-income housing in Clackamas County, including non-subsidized low-cost apartments. Manages Housing Authority-owned units, subsidized rental housing, and the Section 8/Housing Choice Voucher program. Handles complaints related to public housing and Section 8. 13930 S Gain Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Varies by program or property Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, holiday hours posted on website Email (503) 655-8267 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON HOUSING AND COMMUNITY SERVICES MANUFACTURED AND MARINA COMMUNITIES RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides technical assistance and dispute resolution services to landlords and tenants in manufactured dwelling parks. Provides copies of relevant laws and general information on rights and responsibilities. Assists clients in making decisions about how to handle manufactured dwelling park-related situations. May be referred to local mediation services for dispute resolution. Also maintains the statewide Manufactured Home Park Directory, which offers information on spaces available for rent. Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (800) 453-5511 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF CORVALLIS LIVABILITY CODE ENFORCEMENT CITY OF PORTLAND RENTAL SERVICES HELPLINE HOUSING AUTHORITY OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY
